title: Device Home Screen - Release Notes button opens modal with Release Notes
scenario: User views release notes modal on Device Home screen and dismisses it by tapping OK
steps: 1. Navigate to the Device Home screen.
2. Locate and tap the 'Release Notes' button.
3. Observe that a modal appears displaying release notes for the connected device.
4. Tap the 'OK' button within the modal.
5. Observe that the modal closes and the user is returned to the Device Home screen.
expected: Tapping the Release Notes button opens a modal with release notes. Tapping OK closes the modal and returns to the Device Home screen.
